meaning: n.pl.爱恶作剧的孩子,侏儒(elf的复数形式)
examples: The first was the so-called "hidden people"—or, to put it more plainly, elves.
To escape the time period, you must complete a series of challenges posted by the elves.
Elves, goblins, and trolls seem to be the timeless creations of the distant past, but gremlins were born in the 20th century.
Everything these elves say seems to have an exclamation point on the end of it.
Fortunately for both Santa and the elves, there is no tax payable on those benefits.
